title: Tagine Chicken with Toasted Nuts
description: A rich and flavorful North African-inspired dish made with chicken, toasted nuts, and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the toasted almonds and tagine spice mix. Cook for 1 minute.
Transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional toasted almonds and tagine spice mix if desired.
